goal: build me a full stack day care site
lastRunSummary: The Vercel deployment for the daycare site is still encountering issues, specifically an HTTP 401 error after deployment, which typically indicates missing or incorrect environment variables for Clerk authentication. The updated code, including the fix for the `autoprefixer` dependency and the corrected Clerk `auth` import, has been pushed to your GitHub repository: https://github.com/Goatkenziee/daycare-site. You will need to manually configure the Clerk environment variables (NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY and CLERK_SECRET_KEY) in your Vercel project settings, along with the DATABASE_URL, for the deployment to succeed. Once these are set, you can trigger a redeployment from your Vercel dashboard.
